blended.narrative: Whitewater is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,006 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
